notes: Largest single category. Includes racial slurs, COVID-19 blame language, xenophobic statements.
Second largest. Ranges from spitting to armed assault. Elderly victims most vulnerable to unprovoked attacks.

subcategory: Refused service; excluded; avoided on sidewalk/transit
notes: Reflects social hostility and othering. Often not prosecutable.

subcategory: Workplace discrimination; housing denial; refusal of service; barred from transportation
notes: Actionable under civil rights law but not criminal hate crime statutes.

subcategory: Social media attacks; doxxing; threatening messages
notes: Particularly affects non-binary AAPI individuals (12.1% of their reports).

subcategory: Coughing/sneezing on person; following; blocking path
notes: Threat and intimidation behaviors that may not meet criminal threshold.
